overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The character traverses wide boulevards with holographic billboards, ascends stairs with street art, and explores elevated alleyways with food stalls.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit boulevard with holographic billboards and elevated highway

events.description: character turns right at the intersection to proceed down the main street

agents.ego_description: walking across the yellow-striped crosswalk and turning right onto the boulevard

entered.detail: large holographic billboard displaying CYBERPUNK text on building facade
overhead highway with colorful illuminated panels and neon lights
palm trees wrapped in colorful neon lighting along the street median
broad pedestrian crossing with yellow stripes and red markings

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a wide neon-lit boulevard at night, crossing a yellow-striped crosswalk beneath an elevated highway structure covered in colorful lights. Large holographic billboards illuminate the left side while sparse pedestrians move through the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with storefronts and billboards

events.description: transitioning from wide boulevard to narrower commercial street with closer storefronts
slowing pace as approaching the stair entrance with skull graffiti

agents.ego_description: proceeding down the sidewalk past various storefronts and neon signs

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking in the opposite direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: large vertical billboard with SCREAM text and graphic on yellow building
neon sign reading PAWN SHOP on building facade
concrete stairs leading upward with metal railings

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrower commercial street lined with storefronts and neon signage. The SCREAM billboard dominates the right side while the character approaches a stair entrance marked by skull graffiti, transitioning from the open boulevard to a more enclosed street environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairwell with graffiti and neon accents

events.description: beginning ascent of concrete stairs to upper level
entering darker stairwell with reduced ambient light

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs while passing the skull graffiti wall

entered.detail: steep concrete staircase with metal railings leading upward
wall featuring large orange skull graffiti artwork
rusted metal handrail along the stair edge

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a narrow concrete stairwell marked by distinctive skull graffiti on the left wall. The environment becomes darker and more enclosed, transitioning from the street level to an upper pedestrian walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated back alley with food stalls and industrial structures

events.description: emerging from stairwell into upper alley with food stalls
beginning descent of stairs at the far end of the alley

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow upper alley and approaching the descending stairs

entered.detail: street food stall with traditional red paper lanterns hanging overhead
narrow elevated pedestrian path with concrete flooring
tall industrial structures with illuminated windows and ventilation fans
staircase leading downward at the end of the alley

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto an elevated back alley featuring a food stall with red paper lanterns on the left. The narrow walkway is flanked by industrial buildings with glowing windows, leading to a descending staircase at the far end that the character begins to walk down.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a wide, neon-lit city boulevard into the enclosed, industrial heights of an elevated alleyway. It begins by following the character across a yellow-striped crosswalk beneath a glowing highway structure, where massive holographic billboards cast vibrant light over the open street. As the character moves forward, the environment narrows into a commercial street dominated by a SCREAM billboard before shifting toward a concrete stair entrance marked by skull graffiti. The camera then ascends the dark, enclosed stairwell, leaving the street level behind to emerge onto a high pedestrian walkway. Finally, the scene opens into a narrow back alley featuring a food stall with red paper lanterns and glowing industrial windows before turning toward a descending staircase at the far end.
